title: Better Scaffolding For Bare Bones
description: Scaffolding you can easily see through while climbing but re-textured to match the Barebones style — flat, clean, and visibility-friendly.
body:
![An image showing a tower of the bare bones scaffolding from a close distance to the side.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/757bf65a15a3b53b0a43cb03dd27b7dbc2413f32_0.webp)

## **What is it?**
 

Better Scaffolding For Bare Bones improves visibility by making it easier to see through scaffolding while you climb. Perfect for players who love minimal visuals and better functionality while building or climbing.

1. Bare Bones friendly
2. Works with Vanilla and Shaders
3. Great for builders, redstoners, and creative mod
4. Compatible with most other packs
5. Now available for 26.1 and above

 

## **How to use:**

Set pack above 'Bare Bones' in your resources tab.


![A screenshot of the minecraft resources pack GUI zoomed in on the selected column showing Better Scaffolding For Bare Bones placed above 'Bare Bones'. This is giving instructions for how to properly use.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bb1ee5247cca2e696b7caeef301c5a7bcaa2319.png)
